payload.title: Law notice: avoid semantic duplication and sandwiching
payload.summary: Operator law notice for Narada agents: try to avoid semantic duplication and sandwiching of your messages.
evidence: Operator explicitly instructed: try to avoid semantic dplication and sandwiching of your messages.
proposal: Affected agents should acknowledge receipt and absorb this as communication law for future replies.
payload.recommendation: Use this as the first pilot for durable law-change propagation with agent receipt and absorption evidence; OSM may notify but must not be the authority medium.
